location.office_time_required: blend of in-office and remote work including travel cross-country 3-4 times per quarter on average

level_signals: 5+ years of experience managing high-performing teams
10+ years of experience in high-performance cultures
Reports into GM of Retail; co-manages P&L with GM
Manages a team of direct & indirect reports
Comp range $197,200–$290,000 base consistent with Director-level at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 10+ years of experience. You've succeeded in high-performance cultures (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).
You are a leader. You have 5+ years of experience managing high-performing teams.
You have completed your BS/BA Degree.
co-manage the P&L with our GM of Retail

You will work on initiatives that drive customer conversion, generate cross-category adoption, net-new off-app growth strategies, affordability paradigms tailored for a best-in-class retail experience.
You'll work with a cross-functional team, including engineering, marketing, design, product, and more, as well as lead and develop your own pod to build.
You solve problems from first principles. You're excited to solve problems in innovative ways, and you resist "this is how it's always been done" thinking.
You're unafraid of ambiguity. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you thrive in ambiguous, startup environments
You'll assess the operational and financial impacts of your decisions, and use your judgement to balance the short and long term trade offs.

scope.surface: DoorDash Retail consumer initiatives — growth, shopping experience, P&L; New Verticals including Grocery, Convenience, Alcohol, Retail, Pets, Flowers, Home Improvement
core_responsibilities: Single threaded owner for all consumer initiatives including growth and shopping experience
Co-manage the P&L with GM of Retail
Partner with product, engineering, and design to develop vision for local retail
Drive customer conversion, cross-category adoption, off-app growth, and affordability strategies
Be accountable for the top line number for retail
Lead and develop a pod of direct and indirect reports
Transform strategies into operational experiments with measurable outcomes

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and broad ($197,200–$290,000 base)
Equity grants mentioned in addition to base
Clear P&L ownership and defined product surface (Retail within New Verticals)
Reports directly to GM of Retail — senior visibility
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Explicit DE&I commitments and fair chance hiring policy
red_flags: No specific cities listed for hybrid requirement — candidates cannot assess commute burden without contacting recruiter
Travel required cross-country 3–4 times per quarter — significant travel commitment not fully highlighted in requirements section
Visa sponsorship status not addressed in JD
Broad comp range ($92,800 spread) may indicate significant variance by location or leveling
